direction: Post-apocalypse large-map survival against zombie hordes with a full weapon system and safehouse expansion.
control_model: left-stick movement, right-side aim and fire controls, contextual action buttons, bike mount transition
core_loop_signature: plan route, ride into a frontier region, scavenge resources, fight or evade zombie groups with weapon choice, rescue survivors, extract to safehouse, upgrade weapons and facilities
differentiation_axes: large macro map with 12 connected frontier regions instead of one small arena
bike-supported traversal and extraction pressure as a core system
explicit multi-family weapon system with mastery and attachment progression
safehouse network growth and survivor assignment instead of simple score progression
noise attraction and horde migration that alter repeat routes
forbidden_template_reuse: no fixed central keep defense structure
no tiny single-screen survival board reused from prior zombie projects

map_content_budget.play_area_model: 12 macro regions with 3 to 5 connected field subzones each, linked by roads, alleys, tunnels, and relay corridors
map_content_budget.route_or_region_count: 12 macro regions, minimum 40 field subzones, minimum 18 signature landmarks, minimum 5 safehouse or relay hubs
map_content_budget.interactive_regions: safehouses, gas stations, checkpoints, hospitals, relay towers, depots, survivor camps, infected nests, trader stops
map_content_budget.decorative_prop_count: at least 25 recurring prop families across vehicles, barricades, signs, rubble, fencing, and utility hardware
map_content_budget.camera_or_scroll_model: free camera within each field zone with bounded follow, plus macro route map between zones

special_rules: landmark completion can permanently open safer routes
risk_reward_systems: deeper landmark dives provide rare weapon parts
quiet weapon play preserves ammo and reduces horde attraction
optional contracts trade safety for high-value rewards
escorting survivors slows extraction but unlocks long-term bonuses

primary_game_art_packs: ruined road and industrial terrain pack
secondary_game_art_packs: weapon muzzle and explosion effect pack
asset_variety_budget.animation_tier: medium_high for player and primary infected, medium for props and support actors
asset_variety_budget.minimum_distinct_sprite_families: minimum 12 major sprite families across player, bike, six zombie roles, survivors, landmarks, pickups, hazards, and major effects
asset_variety_budget.asset_reuse_note: reuse should stay role-specific and must not collapse the game into one zombie sprite family, one road tile family, or one generic HUD pack reused from earlier survival projects
